title: Welcome
paragraphs: Hello, and welcome to Lampy Paperwork.
This application is currently under active development and testing.
Lampy Paperwork is designed to provide a faster and more efficient way of creating show paperwork for power distribution, fixture patching, and live entertainment workflows.
Feedback, suggestions, feature requests, and bug reports are always welcome via the GitHub project page:
Please also submit missing fixture requests via the GitHub Page.
Thank you for helping test and improve the project.
